services.subtitle: What We Do
services.title: Our Services
services.description: From repairs to sales, we've got every mobile need covered under one roof.
services.item0Desc: Screen replacements, battery swaps, water damage recovery and more.
services.item1Desc: Brand-new and certified pre-owned smartphones at competitive prices.
services.item2Desc: Cases, tempered glass, chargers, earphones, power banks — everything you need.
services.item3Desc: SIM-only deals, pay-as-you-go SIMs, and professional phone unlocking.

products.subtitle: Shop Now
products.title: Featured Products
products.description: Hand-picked phones and accessories at unbeatable prices.

reviews.subtitle: Testimonials
reviews.title: What Our Customers Say
reviews.review0Text: Brilliant service! Had my screen replaced in under an hour. Prices are very fair and the staff are super friendly.
reviews.review1Text: Bought a refurbished iPhone here — works like new. They even threw in a free case. Highly recommend!
reviews.review2Text: Best phone shop in town. Quick unlocking service and great advice on which phone to buy. Five stars!

contact.subtitle: Get In Touch
contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Have a question or need a quick quote? Reach out — we're always happy to help.

sell.subtitle: Sell Your Device
sell.title: Sell Your Device to Us
sell.description: Have a used smartphone or tablet? We'll buy it from you! Fill out the form and we'll get back to you with a fair offer.
sell.deviceNamePlaceholder: e.g. iPhone 13 Pro, Samsung Galaxy S22
sell.additionalInfoPlaceholder: Storage, colour, accessories included, known defects...
sell.successMessage: Thank you! We'll get back to you within 24 hours with an offer.
sell.step1Desc: Describe your device and its condition.
sell.step2Desc: We'll respond with a fair price offer.
sell.step3Desc: Bring your device in and get paid instantly.
